## 🏷️ Labels

- [ ] `critical` - System down/data loss
- [ ] `high-priority` - Core functionality broken
- [ ] `medium-priority` - Feature degraded
- [ ] `low-priority` - Minor issue
- [ ] `type/backend` - API/server issue
- [ ] `type/frontend` - UI issue
- [ ] `type/infra` - Docker/K8s issue
- [ ] `type/performance` - Performance degradation
- [ ] `type/security` - Security concern

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I've searched for similar issues
- [ ] I've reproduced the issue consistently
- [ ] I've provided minimal reproduction steps
- [ ] All logs are included (with sensitive data redacted)
- [ ] This is not a feature request or documentation issue
